programme.title: Tin Tan y las modelos
programme.desc: Tin-Tan y su esposa Severa son los directores del Patronato de la Moral y Etica Social. Sin embargo Tin-Tan tuvo como antepasado a Casanova, quien le da tres maravillosas lecciones de amor con tres hermosas jovenes, Rosa, Teresa y Mapita.

programme.title: Escuela de verano (LAS)
programme.desc: Dos mujeres fundan una escuela de verano para jóvenes del continente, pero el consejero les roba el dinero.

programme.title: Espérame en Siberia, vida mía (LAS)
programme.desc: El soltero y millonario Mauricio, cansado de ir de mujer en mujer e influenciado por su médico de cabecera, decide casarse. Sin embargo, su futuro suegro le pide cambiar su testamento.

programme.title: Escuela para solteras
programme.desc: Amador quiere casarse con sus novia. La jefa de la familia le pone una condición: Todas las hermanas mayores que ella tienen que casarse primero y por orden de edades. Siendo su novia la menor, Amador tiene que buscarles marido a todas sus cuñadas.

programme.title: La loca
programme.desc: Un joven psiquiatra se interesa en el caso de una paciente que cree vivir en el año 1936. Los parientes de ella quieren hacerla pasar por sana para poder cobrar una herencia, pero el médico lucha contra toda la familia para defender a 'La loca'.

programme.title: Juana Gallo
programme.desc: La verdadera historia de Angela Ramos una joven campesina que llegó a ser la cabeza de una guerrilla que lucho exitosa-mente contra las fuerzas federales del usurpador Victoriano Huerta. El pueblo la llamó por su fiereza “Juana Gallo”.

programme.title: El sordo (LAS)
programme.desc: Un escultor que fabrica imágenes de santos es golpeado por un matón y queda sordo. A causa de esto, se avergüenza y se va del pueblo.

programme.title: Música y Dinero
programme.desc: Cuando un grupo de empleados amenaza con hacer huelga, el jefe le pide a un amigo cantante que ha recibido una herencia que lo ayude con su problema.

programme.title: A contrarreloj
programme.desc: En este fascinante thriller, el jefe de Policía (Denzel Washington) de una pequeña ciudad, se ve inmerso en graves problemas al investigar el asesinato de una mujer con la que mantenía una relación en secreto porque todas las pruebas apuntan a él.

programme.title: Paranoia
programme.desc: Kale Brecht (Shia LaBeouf) pasa los días espiando a los vecinos, mientras cumple un arresto domiciliario de tres meses. Todo es juegos y diversión hasta que las cosas dan un horroroso giro hacia lo peor.

programme.title: John Grisham's: el poder de la justicia
programme.desc: Matt Damon es Rudy Baylor, un abogado novato superado por un caso de alto perfil. En su contra, un ejército de tiburones de la ley. De su lado, Deck Shifflet, un batallador "para-abogado" que nunca consiguió obtener su título.

programme.title: Luna de porcelana
programme.desc: Un apasionado thriller de suspenso sobre un detective veterano en una pequeña ciudad de Florida, cuyo romance clandestino con una viuda joven y rica teje una telaraña de engaño, traición y asesinato.

programme.title: Find Me Guilty
programme.desc: Basada en la historia del gángster Jackie DiNorscio (Vin Diesel, 'Furious 7'), quien se representó a sí mismo en el juicio penal más largo de la historia de Estados Unidos. Con Peter Dinklage.

programme.title: Cielo azul
programme.desc: Jessica Lange hace una interpretación ganadora de un premio "Óscar" como la atractiva e inestable mujer de un científico nuclear (Tommy Lee Jones) que se enfrenta a difíciles decisiones morales a raíz de las pruebas atmosféricas que debe llevar a cabo.

programme.title: El juego del amor
programme.desc: La ciudad de Oregon es el escenario de este cuento de gente hipnotizada por el hechizo del amor. Del romántico Bradley (Greg Kinnear) a Harry (Morgan Freeman), un maestro con sabiduría y experiencia para orientar a los que le rodean.

programme.title: Decepcionado
programme.desc: Una entretenida comedia sobre dos viejos amigos, y examantes, cuya reunión sorpresa cambia sus vidas y la de todos los demás en su pequeño pueblo, el cual se encuentra en crisis.

programme.title: Cosas te tíos
programme.desc: Jason Lee interpreta a un ejecutivo en la ciudad de Seattle que se va a casar con la hija de su jefe (Selma Blair). Su vida se convierte en una pesadilla cuando no se acuerda si la engañó durante su despedida de soltero.

programme.title: The Englishman Who Went Up A Hill But Came Down A Mountain (LAS)
programme.desc: Hugh Grant protagoniza un joven que ofende a todo un pueblo al decir que su montaña es una colina. Pronto se da cuenta de que los excéntricos lugareños, guiados por un ingenioso posadero (Colm Meaney) no se detendrán ante nada para defender su honor.

programme.title: The Curious Case Of Benjamin Button
programme.desc: Brad Pitt y Cate Blanchett protagonizan esta adaptación de la historia de F. Scott Fitzgerald acerca de un anciano que va rejuveneciendo y los problemas que surgen cuando se enamora de una mujer.

programme.title: A Month By The Lake
programme.desc: Una huésped encantadora en el resort cerca del lago Como tiene el ojo puesto en un simpático y adinerado soltero y hace todo los posible por capturar a su hombre adinerado.

programme.title: Regreso al infierno
programme.desc: Cuando período de servicio en Irak llega a su fin, cuatro soldados estadounidenses se enteran de que están programados pare emprender una misión final. Una misión profética que cambiará eternamente el concepto que tenían hasta ahora de guerra.

programme.title: Rogue Warfare
programme.desc: Stephen Lang (Avatar) protagoniza Rogue Warfare, una película llena de acción en la que se reúne un equipo internacional de soldados expertos de las fuerzas especiales, para una misión secreta en Afganistán.

programme.title: La gran fuga
programme.desc: Un mafioso atrapa a dos ladrones de autos mientras le roban y les da una semana para conseguirle un Ferrari clásico. Si no, podrían perderlo todo.

programme.title: Narc: Calles peligrosas
programme.desc: Jason Patric es Nick Tellis, un oficial de narcóticos suspendido que debe investigar el asesinato de Michael Calvess, un policía novato que murió por circunstancias dudosas.

programme.title: Hostage
programme.desc: Un negociador de la policía fracasado que se convierte en un oficial de una pequeña ciudad debe salvar a una familia secuestrada, lo que lo conduce a una situación muy peligrosa.

programme.title: La suburban dorada
programme.desc: Un policía judicial es acusado de estar relacionado con el narcotráfico solo por ayudar a su primo. Las circunstancias lo convierten en un fugitivo de la ley y por recuperar a su hijo tiene que involucrase con el narcotráfico.

programme.title: Instinto predador
programme.desc: Un cazador (Nicolas Cage) debe luchar por su vida en un barco cuando sus mortíferos animales -entre ellos un raro jaguar blanco- son soltados por un peligroso criminal que quiere matar a todos a bordo.

programme.title: Me late chocolate
programme.desc: Después de que su prometido muere inesperadamente, una mujer decide aceptar la vida y seguir su sueño de trabajar con chocolate.

programme.title: Una mujer sin filtro
programme.desc: Paz, una amable mujer, permitió que todos alrededor de ella la trataran como si no fuera nada, manteniendo el silencio para no herir ningún sentimiento. Hasta que un día, un fenómeno fuerza su cabeza a expresar lo que siente.

programme.title: Cásese quien pueda
programme.desc: Una comedia romántica sobre cómo la boda del siglo salió mal en todas las formas posibles.

programme.title: Ladrón que roba ladrón
programme.desc: A un par de ladrones profesionales se les complica su plan para robar a un millonario, después de que los mejores miembros de su equipo habitual, abandonan el plan. Los ladrones se verán forzados a contratar a novatos para completar el trabajo.

programme.title: Ladrones
programme.desc: Fernando Colunga y Eduardo Yáñez lideran las risas como los Robin Hoods modernos en esta tremendamente entretenida secuela del gran éxito "Ladrón que roba a ladrón".

programme.title: Piedras
programme.desc: La película narra la trayectoría paralela y conflictiva de cinco mujeres: Anita, Isabel, Adela, Leire, y Maricarmen. Ellas se esfuerzan para remover las piedras que insistentemente aparecen en su camino, o peor, que están en sus zapatos.

programme.title: Especie mortal II
programme.desc: Un extraterrestre en forma de parásito se incuba en el cuerpo de un astronauta. Justin Lazard, Natasha Henstridge, Marg Helgenberger, Michael Madsen, Mykelti Williamson. Director: Peter Medak.

programme.title: Encubrimiento
programme.desc: Una policía investiga el asesinato de un compañero y se enfrenta a un espíritu maligno que acosas a los policías de su unidad. Pronto descubre el siniestro secreto sobre el encubrimiento de un tiroteo en contra de un joven desarmado.

programme.title: Insectos
programme.desc: Un veterano de guerra paranoico y desquiciado que ve insectos por todas partes se refugia con una mujer solitaria en una espeluznante habitación de un motel de Oklahoma.

programme.title: Especies
programme.desc: Un experimento genético genera a una hermosa mujer mutante que amenaza a la raza humana.

programme.title: Especie mortal II
programme.desc: Un extraterrestre en forma de parásito se incuba en el cuerpo de un astronauta. Justin Lazard, Natasha Henstridge, Marg Helgenberger, Michael Madsen, Mykelti Williamson. Director: Peter Medak.

programme.title: Especies III
programme.desc: A medida que su especie se extingue por infecciones y enfermedades, una alienígena seductora inmunológicamente más fuerte se convierte en la única esperanza para que sigan viviendo.

programme.title: Encubrimiento
programme.desc: Una policía investiga el asesinato de un compañero y se enfrenta a un espíritu maligno que acosas a los policías de su unidad. Pronto descubre el siniestro secreto sobre el encubrimiento de un tiroteo en contra de un joven desarmado.

programme.title: Los tres amigos
programme.desc: Las locuras de tres actores hollywoodenses (Steve Martin, Chevy Chase y Martin Short) que enfrentan a un grupo de bandidos mexicanos. ¿Qué podría salir mal?

programme.title: Jay y el silencioso Bob

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1995, cuando Steven Fortin ataca a la Oficial de Policía Estatal de Maine fuera de su hora servicio, Vicky Gardner, durante una parada rutinaria, se desencadena una serie de eventos que reinician de golpe un caso de asesinato estancado en New Jersey.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Una Bolsa de Evidencia
programme.desc: Se investiga el asesinato de Jessica Knott, de 9 años. Los investigadores usan una bolsa de basura para conectar al sospechoso James Edward Crow, Jr. con el crimen.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: A la mano
programme.desc: Un oficial de policía acusado de matar a su ex esposa insiste en que ella se suicidó. Los investigadores dicen que fue un asesinato, que era físicamente imposible que la mujer se disparara.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Durante 15 meses, un asesino en serie estranguló a prostitutas en Florida y luego se burló de la policía dejando los cuerpos a la vista. Las únicas pistas fueron una huella de neumático y algunos hilos.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Un embrague de testigos
programme.desc: Dos testigos presenciales pueden tener la llave de la muerte de un miembro de una pandilla de motociclistas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La mejora digital del video de la cámara de seguridad muestra que lo que parece ser un encuentro casual es en realidad un secuestro forzado, que conduce al asesinato.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La policía de California tenía varios sospechosos en el robo y brutal asesinato de una pareja de ancianos.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Avis Banks y su hijo no nacido fueron brutalmente asesinados. El cuerpo fue descubierto por su prometido Keyon Pittman. La policía se enteró de que Pittman estaba teniendo aventuras con otras mujeres y se convirtió en el principal sospechoso.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Dos hombres fueron asesinados mientras dormían en sus camas. La noche siguiente, un incendio provocó la destrucción de una clínica de planificación familiar.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La esposa de un oficial de policía muy respetado es asesinada en su propio hogar. El crimen quedó sin resolver por más de una década, hasta que se forma una nueva unidad de casos sin resolver, que le dan un nuevo vistazo a la evidencia.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1997, se encontró el carro de Kelly Eckart, con todas sus pertenencias aún dentro del mismo, después de haber trabajado un turno nocturno en Franklin, Indiana. Días más tarde, se encontró su cuerpo en un barranco aislado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un oficial de policía de Alaska encontró el cuerpo de una mujer mientras patrullaba de rutina un parque público.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Se encuentra a Nancy Newman y a sus dos hijas que fueron brutalmente asesinadas. La escena del crimen no tiene escasez de pruebas, pero los investigadores no pueden encontrar un vínculo concluyente con su principal sospechoso.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un asesinato brutal, muchos sospechosos y pruebas contradictorias, pero los forenses fueron claros en una cosa: el asesino conocía a su víctima. Y eso les dio a los investigadores una ventaja.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1981, la oficial de la correccional de New York, Donna Payant, desapareció y luego fue encontrada en un vertedero. El médico forense no solo identificó la causa de la muerte, sino que también encontró una pista importante.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Parece que una mujer ha perdido el control de su camioneta SUV y ha caído en el barranco de un arroyo poco profundo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Se sospecha un juego sucio cuando Glenda Furch, una trabajadora de una fábrica de Fort Worth, desaparece después de completar su turno.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: ¿Quién fue el delincuente sexual que asesinó a dos muchachos adolescentes en Nebraska? La clave para detenerlo sería la composición única de la cuerda basura que usó para amarrar a sus víctimas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando un miembro adinerado de la sociedad muere después de caer de las escaleras, los testimonios de los testigos contradicen la evidencia.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El cuerpo de Leanne Tiernan, de 16 años, fue descubierto nueve meses después de su desaparición. Los científicos forenses encontraron pistas que pintaron un retrato virtual de su asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Ataque biológico
programme.desc: El Ataque bio terrorista de Rajneeshee en 1984: los investigadores descubren un complot para derrocar al gobierno después de que una cepa única de salmonela enfermara a la gente.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El cuerpo de una mujer joven fue descubierto en una granja aislada cerca de Delano, California. Ella no tenía identificación, pero la policía encontró las llaves de un buzón de correo en los bolsillos de sus pantalones.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Wildest Survival
programme.desc: From brutal cold, to extreme heat, from the ocean depths, to the driest of deserts, this episode showcases some incredible survival stories in the world's most inhospitable environments.

programme.title: World's Wildest City: Anchorage
programme.desc: Travelling an incredible, 3500 miles through rivers and streams, salmon are Alaska's hardiest resident. But there is one grizzly hazard they face right at the end of their journey. It's the brown bears.

programme.title: Across the Pacific with Te Radar
programme.desc: Radar travels to the country the locals call \\"The Rock\\" to find out how this country of only 1400 people actually functions as a nation, especially given that 20,000 Niueans live in New Zealand.

programme.title: The Cheetah Diaries
programme.desc: Episode 7

programme.title: Wildest Islands: Galapagos - Darwin's Eden
programme.desc: Situated 1,000km west of Ecuador in South America, the Galapagos archipelago contains 13 main islands and a hundred or so smaller rocks and reefs. The region's wilderness is so pristine and rich in life it altered our entire view of the natural world.

programme.title: Top Dive Sites
programme.desc: Bahamas

programme.title: Across the Pacific with Te Radar
programme.desc: Easter Island or Rapanui might be one of the most isolated inhabited places on the planet but it is world famous for its ancient statues or Moai.

programme.title: Heroes Of The Wild Frontiers
programme.desc: The Royal Bengal Tiger is in it's most primeval form here in the Sunderbans. The tangled mangroves along the tributaries of the river Ganga are one of the most fearsome forests of the World.

programme.title: Top Dive Sites
programme.desc: Baja - Revillagigedo

programme.title: Wild Warrior Encounters
programme.desc: Episode 4

programme.title: EPIC SAFARI ENCOUNTERS
programme.desc: In this final episode, Kristina shares her favourite highlights, humour or behind the scenes action from each of the 19 safari locations. It has indeed been an epic safari with encounters to remember for a lifetime.

programme.title: World's Wildest City: Anchorage
programme.desc: One of Alaska's most secretive and efficient predators, Lynx are usually highly elusive… but in Anchorage, houses are being built in the Lynx's territory, forcing these usually shy big cats, to find new ways to survive on the streets.

programme.title: Peace Parks
programme.desc: In this series we follow the trail of the Transfrontier Parks bordering on South Africa and extending into neighbouring countries. We explore why these conservation areas are important and what they protect.

programme.title: Rising Tide
programme.desc: From Miami’s battle with flooding and storm surges, to the Florida Panhandle’s vulnerability to hurricanes, and New York’s efforts to fortify its waterfront, the episode highlights the innovative and urgent measures being taken to protect these cities.

programme.title: Wildest Survival
programme.desc: The instinct to secure a mate is one of the most powerful that there is. The lengths to which animals will go through in the search for a mate range from the beautiful to the bizarre.

programme.title: Desert Islands Of The Middle East
programme.desc: Episode 2

programme.title: EPIC SAFARI DESTINATIONS
programme.desc: Kavinga Safari Camp

programme.title: EPIC SAFARI ENCOUNTERS
programme.desc: Kristina is back with Sean and hosted at the Hide Safari Camp in Hwange National Park at their driest period. A night drive leads them to a unique finding.

programme.title: Jungle Planet
programme.desc: The Neotropical forests of South America extend across huge territories with an incredible diversity of trees and plants, and the diversity of the animals here is fabulous.

programme.title: Costa Rica: The Rise of Nature
programme.desc: Costa Rica is home to some of the richest marine ecosystems in the world. Biologists and conservationists have undertaken a real race against time to better understand marine ecosystems and protect them.

programme.title: Fear Factor

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Two contestants are seated in the front of a car. The driver is blind folded and the passenger must navigate for them. Player is strapped down in a coffin and then covered with 500 Tarantulas.

programme.title: Fear Factor

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant must get on a pole directly out, under the nose of a helicopter. Players will bob in cheese and then eat grasshoppers. Contestants are hung upside down into a Plexiglas tank filled with Eels. Contestants must drive up with only two wheels.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: The contestant will be put in a clear plex-glass tube that will be lifted up and placed just above the water. Snakes and lizards will be dumped in the box. Contestant will be standing on a plexi-glass incline pirtched on top of a roof in the air.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant will be standing in either end of two large cylinders, suspended in the air over water. Player must grab a mouth full of insects, then place into a meat grinder using their mouth. Inside the tanker truck, it would be filled with water.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants are placed in a box with two plexi-glass walls that will be lifted off the ground. Contestants will be served live snails. Contestants are seated in a car that is in the back of a semi truck.

programme.title: Fear Factor

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant will stand on top of a truck as it speeds trying to grab as many flags. Contestants will shoot potatoes at a target using a shoulder mounted air cannon. The contestant must start the car, there are tractors driving towards their car.

programme.title: Fear Factor

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1996, more than a dozen children in Seattle, Washington, were fighting for their lives. Each one of them had contracted a serious unknown illness. After one died, investigators knew the clock was ticking.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1992, Laura Houghteling disappeared from her Bethesda home and was never seen again. Forensic scientists use evidence from her bedroom to direct police to a prime suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When Joann Katrinak is found dead in a corn field with her infant son, the obvious suspect is the husband and father of the victims. But insects found on the bodies reveal a vital clue which uncovers a twisted story of passion gone wrong.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Flu-like symptoms of a mother and her children prove to be something more serious: thallium poisoning. After the mother's death, investigators turn their attention to finding the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1996, police received a call from Darlie Routier telling them of her two sons' murders. The police found the killer by analyzing blood spatter, doing behavioral profiling and analyzing Darlie's 911 call.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1988, the body of a young woman was discovered in an Ohio river. Most of the evidence had been washed away, but the victim's 6-year-old son unwittingly told investigators all they needed to know — without saying a word. The clue was in his genes.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1969, 25-year-old phone operator Diane Maxwell was raped and murdered. Her brother promised he'd find out who was responsible and bring the killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tooth or Consequences
programme.desc: An investigation into the murder of Katie Poirier is stymied by the lack of a body. Finally, investigators use a single tooth found among some charred remains to identify her.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2004, nursing student Tamika Huston went missing from her Spartanburg, South Carolina home. A tip led detectives to her car, where they found an unknown house key that could help solve the case.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Lives changed in the 20 years following an unsolved murder, and so did forensic science. In time, a high-powered microscope and DNA profiling revealed a clue no one had seen before.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The victim had been sexually assaulted and stabbed to death on the beach. A pair of men's tennis shoes was discovered near her body. Police were sure that if they found the man who fit the shoes, they would also find the man who committed the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Residents of Noel, Missouri were stunned to learn that their bank had been robbed and the bank president was missing. His body was later found floating in a lake, securely bound to a chair with duct tape.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When two women from the same town were murdered in the same way, police feared a serial killer was on the loose. At first they thought the victims had nothing in common until they found tiny clues linking them to the same man.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After 6-year-old Michelle Lee Dorr went missing, her father confessed to murdering her. But investigators soon poked holes in his story, leaving the case unsolved for 14 years.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A 29-year-old woman is killed instantly when a bomb explodes in her home. The device is so powerful that it embedded shrapnel in houses across the street. The bomber had not only knowledge and skill, but also a motive for murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Young Navajos in the Southwest were dying at an alarming rate. The tribe's medicine men provided investigators with a critical clue that would lead halfway around the world to a most unlikely killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A mother of two vanishes after a shopping trip. Her body is discovered a month later, and witnesses say they saw the victim being forced into a car by an unknown person.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1987, a human skull and some bones were discovered at a Boy Scout Camp near Farmington, Missouri. Facial reconstruction aids the investigators in this case.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Investigators find a shoe print, several foreign hairs and unknown fingerprints at a murder scene. But they believe the most telling piece of evidence is the bite mark on the victim's chest.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A Modesto, California teenager goes missing. With no signs of struggle in her home, police suspect she has simply run away — until her naked, bruised body is discovered in a ditch 20 miles away.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: An aspiring model turned up dead and the prime suspect was her boyfriend. When he was eventually cleared, investigators had to dig deeper to find the perpetrator. With the help of a forensic geologist, they identified the most unlikely suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: An assistant manager of a Florida steakhouse is stabbed to death. It appears to be a robbery gone wrong, but a bloody fingerprint reveals that he knew his killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A surgeon is stabbed to death and the most likely suspect is seen in a restaurant at the time of the murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1999, Patrick McRae was found dead in his Des Moines home and the crime scene was awash with blood. Analysis showed it had come from two people, one of whom was female.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1995, the founder of American Atheists disappeared with one of her sons, her granddaughter and $500,000 in gold coins. The police investigated several suspects, including David R. Waters, who worked for American Atheists.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2001, Ginger Hayes and her infant son were abducted during a carjacking. The crime had been reported by a witness within minutes of occurrence.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: It was one of the most unusual cases in forensic history. Investigators had to find a way to solve a murder case using only a squashed tomato found at the crime scene and tiny, pinpoint reflections of light in a photograph.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Wild Force
programme.desc: Alyssa must rely on her martial arts heritage when the Rangers come up against Samurai Org.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Wild Force
programme.desc: The especially powerful Tombstone Org tries to send the Rangers six feet under while Merrick and the Princess try to appease the only Zord capable of saving them.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Wild Force
programme.desc: Nayzor returns more powerful than ever requiring the Rangers to quest across time and space to find a new Zord's help.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Wild Force

programme.title: Power Rangers: Wild Force

programme.desc: Cole learns the truth about his parents when Master Org reveals his sinister origin to the Wild Force Rangers.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Wild Force
programme.desc: Merrick must confront a demon from his past when Zen-Aku returns to claim his soul.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Wild Force

programme.title: Power Rangers: Wild Force
programme.desc: Princess Shayla and Merrick argue as the Flute Org's music ruins their song, causing the Rangers to dance uncontrollably.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Wild Force
programme.desc: While Max and Taylor help Kite look for his home, they are attacked by Jindrax and his brother Juggelo at an amusement park.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Wild Force
programme.desc: The Lion Tamer Org takes control of the Wild Zords and turns them against the Rangers.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Wild Force
programme.desc: Kite finally remembers his past as he grows dissatisfied with mankind's disregard for nature.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Wild Force
programme.desc: Without Princess Shayla or the Wild Zords, the Rangers still refuse to give up in their fight to save the world.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Wild Force
programme.desc: Ten Red Rangers from ten different teams unite to stop the Machine Empire from using Serpenterra to destroy Earth.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Wild Force
programme.desc: The Duke Org Onikage arrives in the Nexus with a plan to infiltrate the Rangers' Animarium and capture Princess Shayla.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Wild Force
programme.desc: The Power Rangers fight across dimensions to try and rescue Princess Shayla from the returning Master Org.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Wild Force

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Se espera que los diez Chefs restantes complazcan a una adolescente exigente que vino a Hell's Kitchen para celebrar su fiesta de cumpleaños.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay hace que los nueve Chefs restantes se sometan a una prueba de sabor con los ojos vendados. Los ganadores pueden ir a un spa; los perdedores deben limpiar la habitación.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay pide un voluntario para cambiar de bando. La dinámica del grupo cambia a medida que los equipos enfrentan su próximo desafío: crear cuatro platos con veinte ingredientes específicos.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: En el desafío de apertura, los dos equipos compiten en una carrera de relevos. Los ganadores tienen lecciones de surf, mientras que los perdedores deben limpiar Hell's Kitchen de arriba a abajo.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay inspira a los seis concursantes, llevándolos al restaurante que administrará el ganador de esta temporada. El ganador de la temporada 3, Rock Harper, hace una aparición especial.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay prepara un desayuno para los Chefs restantes y luego les pide que reproduzcan el plato. Más tarde, Ramsay sabotea la cena para ver cómo reaccionan los competidores ante la adversidad.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los dos finalistas visitan el restaurante del Chef Ramsay en Nueva York, donde los Chefs ejecutivos de otros restaurantes de Ramsay encuentran que sus platos son únicos.

programme.title: World's Biggest and Baddest Bugs

programme.title: Great Lakes Wild

programme.title: Kenya Wildlife Diaries

programme.title: Siberia's Wild Year

programme.desc: When Lupin and his bandit buddies attempt to steal a set of historically significant photographic plates, it turns out they're not the only ones with eyes on the prize in this thievish tale of mayhem and millionaires.

programme.title: LUPIN THE 3rd TVSP #11 The Columbus Files
programme.desc: Lupin and Fujiko are after the mysterious treasure known only as Columbus' Egg. Fujiko was able to memorize the Egg's location, but when she's attacked and loses her memory, all seems lost. No one else knows where it is. What's a thief to do?

programme.title: LUPIN THE 3rd TVSP #12 Missed by a Dollar
programme.desc: At an auction in New York, attendees are shocked when a mysterious man bids $1,000,000 on a plain diamond ring. The man himself is even more astounded when the President of the World Bank outbids him by a single dollar. The man is Lupin!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Inspector Zenigata arrives in San Marino after receiving a note from Lupin III. Instead of a declaration of a new theft, it's a wedding invitation.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Marlow Brozzi, a soccer player from San Marino. A mafia member has proof that Brozzi is cheating so Brozzi approaches Lupin for help.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin and the gang managed to steal a fragment of Marie Antoinette's necklace, but Jigen has been captured by Nyx.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: A toothache prompts Jigen to rush to a clinic in a ruined town. The doctor, Livia, says she'll only take a look at him if he'll let her hold on to his gun, so he has no choice but to hand it over.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Fujiko Mine is seen with the members of a failing circus troupe. A former member of the troupe, Tony Belacastro, known as the Magician, died ten years ago, but the secrets to his magic are written in his "Trick Recipes.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: The widow Elena is the only one who knows where her late husband hid his fortune. Zenigata shows up to protect her from Lupin's gang, who are out to steal it from her. Zenigata and Elena go to her mountain retreat to hide from Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Nyx, Agent MI6 of the British Secret Service, values his wife and daughters above all others, so he keeps his identity as MI6 a secret from them. However, one of his daughters is kidnapped by some mysterious men.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: An eerie old castle converted to a hotel, known as the "The Mansion of the Cursed Bride," where the ghost of a bride is said to appear. It's said that a priceless treasure rests in the hotel, so Lupin and the gang pay a visit.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Long ago a dictator was assassinated, and the assassins involved were later killed one by one. Goemon was one of those involved in the assassination. A former bodyguard of the assassinated dictator, the legendary sniper Zora, might be out for revenge...

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin is invited by both Fujiko and Rebecca to a couples-only wine auction party. Both women have their sights on the same thing: The Lovesick Pig, a legendary wine appearing in the auction.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Rebecca is kidnapped and Lupin must rescue her! Before she was kidnapped, Rebecca had been deciphering a book left behind by a genius scientist, and MI6 made the mysterious comment that it was the "Dream of Italy.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin finally deciphers the book left behind by the genius scientist Uraga, and then mysteriously falls asleep. He ends up in a world where it's impossible to tell whether what he sees is a dream or reality. Is this the "Dream of Italy"?!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin has been arrested and imprisoned. He's tried everything he could to escape, but Zenigata stops him every time. Zenigata then sends Lupin to an even higher-security prison, just to be on the safe side. Has the end of Lupin III has come at last?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin is so broke that he doesn't know what he'll eat tomorrow, so he concocts a plan to steal the Mona Lisa. But the Mona Lisa won't be easy to steal. He does his best to weave through the security net Zenigata has set.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Like a she-devil, the diamond "Cleopatra's Soul" is constantly changing owners. In search of the diamond, Lupin arrives at what appears to be an ordinary school...

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin, Jigen, and Goemon decide to go eat some tasty sushi, but when they hop in the car to leave, they find a dog inside. Lupin promises to drop the dog off with Fujiko while they're out getting sushi.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Greco is a man revered as a savior for defeating evildoers one after another. Everyone Greco targets die within 24 hours, killing and being killed by their own comrades. When provoked by Greco, Lupin and the gang head to Greco's church.

programme.title: Great Games

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits the McFeelys, who are watching after young lambs. Handyman Negri and King Friday put on full cereal-proof armor. When their efforts fail, it is clear that Daniel is the only one who can stop the cereal from falling.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers demonstrates how to use tuning whistles. Daniel has the idea to give the cereal to people who might need food. Neighbor Aber brings a forklift to gather all the boxes. Mr. McFeely brings a video about how people make it.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers remembers a time when he visited Jay Styperk, a para-Olympic swimmer. King Friday's crown has gone missing. He hesitantly enters the castle garden, wearing his swimming cap and goggles.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers uses objects from his kitchen to make a horse sculpture. Prince Tuesday is dressed in a lion costume and startles Mayor Maggie. He explains that wearing the costume helps him feel brave about looking for his father's crown.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mr. McFeely delivers a video about how people make apple juice. King Friday suggests that Lady Aberlin start looking for his missing crown at the Museum-Go-Round.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers arrives with a fish sculpted from the paper by his friend Ben Gonzales. Edgar Cooke shares with Lady Aberlin that his refrigerator and food are gone. She finds it, along with King Friday's crown and the Westwood sign.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Bill Nye, “the Science Guy” stops by to show a science experiment using baking soda and vinegar to blow up a balloon. Mister Rogers shows a video of dump trucks at a construction site, and in Make-Believe, all that was lost is found.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Magician David Copperfield teaches Mister Rogers how to do a magic trick. It takes lots of practice. In Make-Believe, X is giving flying lessons, and there's a video of what the world looks like from a bird's point of view.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Prince Tuesday is upset about being unable to fly, so Lady Elaine gives him a propeller hat. He jumps off the castle wall, thinking the hat will make him fly, and injures his arm. Mister Rogers visits the Uptown String Quartet.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: X says he is feeling guilty about Prince Tuesday's fall. Neighbor Aber says it was not X's flying lessons that made Prince Tuesday get hurt. Mister Rogers shows a video about people making sleeping bags. He visits the workshop of the doll maker.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Instead of changing into a sweater as he typically does, Mister Rogers puts on a vest made by his friend Saihou Njie. Trolley brings a batik cloth to Handyman Negri, who then gives it to King Friday.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers arrives with a children's plastic potty, takes it to his bathroom and compares it to the adult-sized toilet. Prince Tuesday comes up with a game using a bucket but has had his feelings hurt when his father was not impressed.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: King Friday denounces the magic finder balloon. Neighbors Aber and Robert Troll are looking for Lady Elaine. They find her locked in a room of the Museum-Go-Round. At Mister Rogers' house, Levar Burton reads “The Daddy Book.”

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers explains how a wheelchair lift works, and then shows one in action. He shows some of his puppets. Mayor Maggie and Neighbor Aber ride in a wheelchair until they have their checkups from Dr. Bill.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: At the eye doctor's office, Mister Rogers takes part in a general eye examination. The gorilla catches Lady Aberlin as she stumbles, which alarms Lady Elaine Fairchild. Lady Elaine is determined to catch the gorilla.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.desc: Tommy es confundido con un bebé problemático. Una partida de póquer en casa de la tía Miriam.

programme.desc: Tommy se preocupa mucho cuando se corta por primera vez ya que lo desconocido lo asusta, pero aprende que los cortes siempre sanan. Los bebés piensan que Carlitos está creciendo luego de que el abuelo Lou encogiera su ropa en el lavarropas.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Carlitos recibe su primera bicicleta. Los adultos dejan al abuelo en la estación de gasolina.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Los bebés juegan a ser personajes del salvaje Oeste. Tommy decide hacer que Carlitos sea más valiente poniéndolo en el lugar de Angélica.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Carlos y Carlitos deben cuidar a la malvada gata de Angélica, mientras ella y su familia dejan la ciudad. Durante una pijamada, Tommy y Carlitos temen que El Mago de los Sueños venga por ellos, así que le ponen complejas trampas para atraparlo.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Los bebés hacen un viaje al sótano. Los bebés asisten a una fiesta de cumpleaños en la casa de los McNulty.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Didi y Hugo van a un crucero romántico por su aniversario. Mientras Carlos trabaja en su árbol genealógico, Carlitos se entera de sus antepasados. Por otro lado, en el crucero, Didi siente muchos mareos y luego descubre que está embarazada.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Carlitos adopta un patito como su hermano tras sentirse ignorado por Tommy, quien ahora debe cumplir tareas de hermano mayor. Por otro lado, Firulais está celoso por toda la atención que recibe Dil.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Carlitos decide cambiar de imagen tras descubrir que ya no es tan lindo como solía ser. Por otro lado, Angélica les miente a los bebés diciendo que tiene una hermana gemela, con el fin de recibir el doble de golosinas.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Los bebés tratan de enseñarle cosas a Dil, ya que creen que no es tan listo como ellos. Por otro lado, los bebés quieren competir contra Angélica por un juguete e intentan no dormir una siesta.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Tommy escucha que él debe ser el hombre de la casa mientras Hugo está afuera, viajando. Julio llevará a Hugo a un spa para convertirlo en un hombre nuevo. Tommy se preocupa al pensar que su padre se transformará en alguien diferente.

programme.title: Los Casagrande
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne se entera de que en un pasado, Tio Carlos supo ser un famoso patinador y, a partir de ello, comienza a enseñarle movimientos.

programme.title: Los Casagrande
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne y Sid buscan una actividad que hacer juntos después de las clase, pero no encuentran nada que les vaya bien a los dos. Maria tiene, al fin, un día libre, pero Ronnie Anne debe competir con el resto de su familia para estar con ella.

programme.title: Los Casagrande
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne y Sid le enseñan a Adelaide sobre el Día de los Muertos para ayudarla a superar la muerte de su rana. Ronnie Anne renuncia a una tradición familiar de Halloween para asistir a una fiesta.

programme.title: Los Casagrande
programme.desc: La familia descubre un increíble carrito de tamales e intenta mantenerlo en secreto ante la abuela. Ronnie Anne no cree en una predicción astrológica de que el amor la encontrará, hasta que parece hacerse realidad.

programme.title: Los Casagrande
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne está decidida a ayudar a CJ a subirse al escenario durante un espectáculo pirata. Además, Ronnie y Sid deben decidir si utilizan el dinero de un monedero perdido que hallaron en el mercado.

programme.title: Los Casagrande
programme.desc: La familia intenta ayudar a Bobby a superar los nervios por los exámenes. Carl se pierde en el zoológico después de escaparse de su familia para buscar un dragón de Komodo.

programme.title: Los Casagrande
programme.desc: Durante su visita, Ronnie Anne intenta convencer a su padre de que se mude a la ciudad. Con la ayuda de Sid, formula un plan que no puede fallar.

programme.title: Los Casagrande
programme.desc: Bobby se niega a ceder el control sobre el mercado durante su cita con Lori por motivo de su pizzaversario. Ronnie Anne se da cuenta de que ella es la única persona a la que Carlitos no imita, pero se propone conseguir que lo haga.

programme.title: The Layover with Anthony Bourdain
programme.desc: Tony celebrates the independent spirit and artisanal delights of Seattle.

programme.title: The Layover with Anthony Bourdain
programme.desc: Tony Bourdain discovers Dublin has a thriving food scene and the best bars.

programme.title: The Layover with Anthony Bourdain
programme.desc: Tony heads to Atlanta for a generous helping of Southern hospitality.

programme.title: The Layover with Anthony Bourdain
programme.desc: A sharkskin suit adds a twist to Tony's Hong Kong layover.

programme.title: The Layover with Anthony Bourdain
programme.desc: Tony finds you can get a meal of raw meat for under $20 in San Francisco.

programme.title: The Layover with Anthony Bourdain
programme.desc: Tony has a layover in Amsterdam which leads to unexpected adventures.

programme.title: The Layover with Anthony Bourdain
programme.desc: Tony meets up with some chef friends while in London.

programme.title: The Layover with Anthony Bourdain
programme.desc: Behind the wheel of his corvette Tony sees the best and seediest of Miami.

programme.title: The Layover with Anthony Bourdain
programme.desc: In Sao Paulo, Anthony Bourdain dines at D.O.M. and admires street graffiti.

programme.title: The Layover with Anthony Bourdain
programme.desc: In Singapore, Tony hangs with legendary KF Seetoh and soaks in a pool.

programme.title: The Layover with Anthony Bourdain
programme.desc: Via Vespa, trolley tracks and by foot, Tony dives into Roman culture.

programme.title: The Layover with Anthony Bourdain
programme.desc: Anthony Bourdain shows that there's more to Philly than just cheesesteaks.

programme.title: The Layover with Anthony Bourdain
programme.desc: In Taipei, Anthony Bourdain finds the pork and dumplings of his dreams.

programme.title: The Layover with Anthony Bourdain
programme.desc: From Koreatown to the Chateau Marmont, Anthony professes his love for LA.

programme.title: The Layover with Anthony Bourdain
programme.desc: Tony cruises around in the baddest car he can find to take on Chicago.

programme.title: The Layover with Anthony Bourdain
programme.desc: Tony takes on his hometown of New York City.

programme.title: The Layover with Anthony Bourdain
programme.desc: In New Orleans, Tony indulges in fresh crab and shrimp and drinks Sazerac.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Khloe is ready to reveal to Jamal that she may not be the woman he thinks she is. Nick is here to confront his wife Barbara and the man she’s been sleeping with, Jason. Plus, Danielle is ready to confront her friend Amy for spreading lies.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Nikki reveals her secret brotherly affairs, but will Joe ever be able to forgive her? Then, “Six O’Clock” confesses that she’s been sleeping with her friend Carisa’s man for money!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Heaven and her two daughters have been prostitutes for April's boyfriend, Dino. Today, angry family members and even Dino's ex try to talk these women away from him!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Who’s responsible for toddler Noel's well-being? Everyone may deny the allegations, but someone knows what happened, and Steve is getting answers!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I Have Two Husbands
programme.desc: Jessica married Gian after a five month relationship. With a baby on the way, everything seems to be going great for the couple, except Jessica is married to another man, Michael!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Sheroya is 17 and struggling to raise 2 kids while trying to party all the time. Her boyfriend Malcolm frequently cheats and verbally abuses her. Steve’s got a lot of work ahead with this couple, but will either of them wake up?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Trey thinks Queshia slept with his father Nate and Nate could be the father of their baby. Then, Eric began hearing rumors that his girlfriend Blue was having sex for money while he was taking care of their children. Is Trey right or paranoid?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Extreme Deception Indicated
programme.desc: Joe and Tammy have been together for 6 years and they have 2 children. Joe faces cheating accusations again and returns to Steve's stage for his lie detector results!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Jatavious is back to figure out if he fathered his girlfriend's two kids! Then, Freddie suspects that his girlfriend Amanda skipped work to cheat on him, and he does not think that their new twins are his! Don't miss these wild DNA results!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: He Said Give Your Baby Away and You Did
programme.desc: Shannan claims Tim fathered her child. He doesn't buy it because he doesn't recall having sex with her! Later, Ayana is furious that her boyfriend Patrick denies their son!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Sherronda and Derrick are back! He's accusing her of cheating with his best friend of 40 years, Leslie! Next, Amanda admitted to cheating on Eli a few months ago, but now suspects Eli of doing the same to even the score!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Da'Shan is here with his new girl Tyrekia to prove that he's not the father of Ashley's baby! Ashley is 1000% positive that Da'Shan is the father and is here to prove it once and for all. But what will the DNA results reveal?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Jahaza believes that her fiancé Rafiq is cheating on her with the babysitter! Nikema is married to a motivational speaker named Drew. Is he motivating other women into his bed? Plus, Kim and Aaron are back…but this time she's got a secret to reveal!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Nick denies Chantelle's baby, but she wants to prove he's the father and make him pay up. Mario's mother Evette says she went "undercover" to prove that Sierra cheated on her son and that he is not her baby's father! What will the DNA results reveal?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Trey thinks Queshia slept with his father Nate and Nate could be the father of their baby. Then, Eric began hearing rumors that his girlfriend Blue was having sex for money while he was taking care of their children. Is Trey right or paranoid?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Pam suffered two miscarriages from the stress of her boyfriend Miguel's cheating accusations. Felisha confessed to cheating on her boyfriend Natron, but Natron denies fathering her two kids. The truth shall set some of these guests free!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Lianna and Devone have been married for a year, but she suspects Devone of being unfaithful because he stays out all night and is rarely home. Then, Kya is out on a $50,000 bond for allegedly abusing her newborn son, but did she do it?

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Kendra tiene la misión de salvarla de su novio tóxico Chris. A los 17 años, Kendra está embarazada de su sexto hijo. Kendra lo ha intentado casi todo, incluso echarlo de su casa, pero no solamente se defendió, sino que también golpeó a Kendra.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Sheroya tiene 17 años y se esfuerza por criar a 2 niños mientras sale de fiesta sin parar. Su novio Malcolm suele ser infiel y la maltrata verbalmente. Steve tiene mucho trabajo por delante con esta pareja, pero ¿alguno de ellos despertará?

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: ¿Everett tocó a la hija de su novia Michelle? Su ex Robert dice que su hija de 7 años lo contó. ¡Everett se someterá a una prueba con el detector de mentiras para desmentirlo! ¡No te pierdas estos resultados impactantes!

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: ¿Marlo tocó a su hija con Sandra cuando ella tenía 7 años? Ha evitado confrontarla durante casi 10 años, pero hoy, Sandra no se irá hasta que no se sepa la verdad y se haga justicia por su hija.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Steve está celebrando otra reunión de chicas adolescentes para tratar los problemas más importantes a los que se pueden enfrentar todas las adolescentes, incluyendo el uso de drogas, el abuso físico y los agresores en Internet.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Sherry fue atacada a los 15 años y se escapó de su casa. Quiere que Steve la ayude a reunirse con su madre. Después, la hija adolescente de Dawn, Cathy, dio a luz recientemente, pero vive asustada por el desempleado e inestable padre del bebé, Nick.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: ¡Kristy quiere que su madre, Donna, le devuelva su bebé! Donna afirma que se llevó al bebé porque nació con graves discapacidades debido a que Kristy consumió drogas durante el embarazo. ¿Quién está mintiendo?

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Aeshia ha venido a demostrar a Terrence y a su esposa Lashondra que Terrence es el padre de su hijo, pero Lashondra sabe que se equivoca. Tanto Shaunah como Chris se han convencido de que les son infieles. ¿Quién es el padre?

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: La relación de dos años de Anastasia y Robert terminó cuando él escuchó rumores de que ella le era infiel. Ella dice que siempre le ha sido fiel, pero Robert no le cree y ahora duda que sea el padre de su bebé recién nacido.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Stephanie dice que desde que llegó a casa del trabajo y encontró a su hijo de un año con un ojo morado, ha temido que la niñera de sus hijos los lastime. La niñera Cheryl niega las graves acusaciones acerca del niño.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Thornton dice que no puede confiar en su novia infiel Crystal y quiere que se someta al detector de mentiras. Además, Stephanie quiere demostrarle a su marido, Mathew, que no está teniendo sexo con un miembro de su familia.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Deshawn afirma que su ex Lynette abandonó a su hijo de 5 años. Pero ella afirma que él la está alejando de su hijo. Sin embargo, Deshawn se enteró recientemente de que no está en el certificado de nacimiento de su hijo, ¡así que quiere una prueba de ADN!

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Stephanie dio a luz a un niño y cree que Brandon es el padre. Pero Brandon afirma que no supo del niño hasta tres años después y niega ser el padre. Stephanie y su mamá quieren que Brandon se haga cargo.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Megan quería saber si su novio Devin era infiel. ¡Pero salieron a la luz secretos de relaciones aún peores! Además, te sorprenderá saber por qué Laura y Steven necesitan que Steve los ayude otra vez.

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: Mariana le explica a Martín que solo puede quererlo como amigo, ya que ama a Willy. Margot y Willy tuvieron su primera noche de luna de miel, solo que Willie no deja de pensar en Mariana.

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: Margot y Willy tienen otra de su discusiones, pues ella insiste en que cobre su herencia. Panchita y Santiago oyen la discusión con preocupación.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Gabriel se enfrenta a Eva, diciéndole que se siente utilizado por ella para llevar a cabo su plan de retener a Luis Mario..

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: En el restaurante, Eduarda llama la atención de Luis Mario, Eva, y Patricio, al percatarse de la llegada de Rosaura y Rafael acompañados por Claudia.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: En la hacienda, Luis Mario se muestra desesperado por la destrucción de sus siembras. Carlos se encarga de ocultar su culpabilidad tras haberse aliado a Camelia.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: En el hospital, tras enterarse de la noticia del accidente que sufrió Iván, Rosaura se muestra interesada en saber el diagnóstico de su hermano.

programme.title: Acorralada
programme.desc: Caramelo acude a Fedora para que le dé alojo en la mansión, y le cuenta cómo Octavia hizo para que ella se fuera de la casa de su padre.

programme.title: Acorralada
programme.desc: Fedora le reclama a Paco el haberse casado con Octavia y el hecho de querer ocultárselo.

programme.title: Acorralada
programme.desc: Octavia va a la casa donde vive Paola y se encuentra con la sorpresa de que la otra esposa de Pancholón es nada más y nada menos que Caramelo.

programme.title: Acorralada
programme.desc: Silvia planea que cuando se confirme la desaparición definitiva de Diana, ella le confesará a Maximiliano la verdad que el hijo de Diana es de él.

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: Margot y Willy tienen otra de su discusiones, pues ella insiste en que cobre su herencia. Panchita y Santiago oyen la discusión con preocupación.

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: Mariana llora al acordarse de Willy. Juliana y Ricky van con Hilario a ver al doctor de Luciano y lo engañan para sacarle la verdad sobre su salud. Natalia y Rosa se divierten bailando.

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: Hilario y Mariana intentan que Ricky no se dé cuenta de que su mamá y su abuela están borrachas, pero no lo logran. Mariana libera a Hilario y Ricky de toda culpa.

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: Para disgusto de Margot, Willy invita a Mariana y Martin a una cena para celebrar el cobro de la herencia y molestar a Gertrudis. Morgana inventa un encuentro con una amiga y Luciano le entrega las llaves de la caja fuerte.

programme.title: Real America With Dan Ball
programme.desc: Dan Ball brings the latest political headlines by interviewing news makers of the day, including politicians, lawmakers, pundits, celebrities and social media influencers.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro finishes off Pica, and those below his crumbling body rush to find shelter. Meanwhile, the Tontattas finish up demolishing the SMILE Factory, and Luffy's hand is forced in his duel with Bellamy!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Taking down Bellamy only enrages Luffy in his fight against Doflamingo, his anger multiplying when he finds Law's lifeless body! Meanwhile, Doflamingo takes the next step to end the game he started, which will endanger everybody in Dressrosa!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Birdcage draws tighter and tighter around Dressrosa, threatening to destroy all life on the island kingdom! Meanwhile, Doflamingo stands down Luffy for a final confrontation, but a surprising twist shocks everyone on the top of the Royal Palace!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Law's attack proves powerful - but Doflamingo's power has depths which he and Luffy haven't bargained for. When Doflamingo makes his counterattack, Luffy stares him down with an amazing power.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Trebol's wrath is fully inflamed as Law summons enough energy to speak, denouncing the Doflamingo Family executives as pawns in Doflamingo's game. But Law gathers enough energy to do more than just speak out.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Cavendish has to make a difficult decision when the severely wounded Law begs him to be left behind. Meanwhile, seeing even his Second Gear or Third Gear attacks aren't working against Doflamingo, Luffy decides to use his ultimate technique!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and Doflamingo duke it out while the Birdcage tightens its grip on Dressrosa! Zoro sets off with a plan to stop it from slicing apart the country, while Luffy's Fourth Gear proves quite potent against Doflamingo!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Birdcage continues its merciless constriction, sending the residents of Dressrosa fleeing towards the center of the island, while King Riku calls out to his people: Survive long enough for Luffy to vanquish the last of the royal family.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Fourth Gear gives Luffy the power he needs to head off Doflamingo at every strike! But the energy required to keep Fourth Gear going starts to take a toll on Luffy. Will he have enough left to finish the job?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Bounce-man's power has drained Luffy, leaving him in need of a rest before he can reuse his Haki, but luckily the gladiators from the Colosseum have come around and are focusing on taking down Doflamingo! Sabo steps in at a crucial moment.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: With Luffy and so many of the Straw Hats' allies incapacitated, victory seems inevitable for Doflamingo - but the compassion of Mansherry may be enough to turn the tide and renew their hope - to stop the Birdcage!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: With just over a minute to spare, everyone in Dressrosa turns their efforts towards slowing down the Birdcage as it squeezes the life out of the country! Meanwhile, Viola seeks Doflamingo out herself, for a shocking confrontation!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Only a bit more time remains before Luffy returns to the scene! But as time slips by, those who had been roused by Princess Mansherry's powers begin to falter! Meanwhile, Rebecca, under the control of Doflamingo, is about to attack Viola!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy regains enough Haki to face off against Doflamingo, but his health is still poor. With the Birdcage closing in, is there a technique left in his repertoire that is strong enough to take down Doflamingo?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: With Doflamingo thoroughly quashed and the Birdcage collapsing, the people of Dressrosa shed tears of joy remembering the hardships they've endured, and the actions taken by Luffy and the others to free them.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Jesus Burgess of the Blackbeard Pirates tries to agitate Sabo, mocking Ace's final words in order to unsettle him enough that he can try to steal the Flare-Flare Fruit! Meanwhile, people of Dressrosa beg King Riku to resume the crown.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Repercussions of Doflamingo's defeat reverberate around the world! Fujitora's actions put the Navy in a tight spot, and the "Worst Generation" beings to stir into action!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The combatants in the battle for Dressrosa can finally begin to recoup, but those who stay awake are treated to the story of how Sabo joined the Revolutionary Army!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sabo recounts his surprising reunion with Luffy at the Colosseum as the Straw Hats and the others continue to recoup. Meanwhile, Fujitora gambles on how to make his next move - and the odds are in Luffy's favor!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: As Sabo departs, our attention shifts to the other Straw Hats waging a fierce battle on a mysterious island. And a new drama is set into motion as ill portents fall from the sky!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: As Luffy and the others begin to come to their senses, major players in the Navy arrive to search Dressrosa for the Straw Hats! Also, Rebecca's history is whitewashed with a fake cover story - but why?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Fujitora's flirting with chance has turned out poorly for the Straw Hats as the full Navy force bears down on Dressrosa searching for the pirates! Luffy and the others make a mad dash for the east port to get off the island.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Rebecca has precious little time to follow Luffy's lead and make it to Kyros. Can she make it in time? Meanwhile, Fujitora is closing in on Bartolomeo and the other Colosseum warriors while Trafalgar Law faces the shadows of his past!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Law and Sengoku share memories of Corazon, and the secret of Trafalgar Law's name. Meanwhile, Fujitora uses the destruction caused by the battle in Dressrosa as a weapon, and squares off one-on-one with Luffy!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The people of Dressrosa show their appreciation to the Straw Hats one last time by foiling Fujitora's strategy. As Luffy and the others are able to finally make their break from the island, however, an unbelievable new chapter opens in the story.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: With newfound allies won in the battle at Dressrosa, and as the Navy watches, Luffy and the Straw Hats depart Dressrosa for open water. But will Luffy accept the oath of allegiance given by his new fleet?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While the Straw Hats are underway, Doflamingo has serious predictions for the upset of the world order! Meanwhile, the recent actions in Dressrosa have led to surprising results!

programme.title: The Legend of Bagger Vance
programme.desc: A disillusioned war veteran, Rannulph Junah, agrees to play a game of golf. He finds the game futile until his caddy, Bagger Vance, teaches him the secret of the authentic golf stroke.

programme.desc: A year has passed. It is time for Odysseus and his men to leave the witch Circe’s island and return to Ithaca. To do so, they must first go to meet the prophet Tiresias in the Underworld.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths: The Odyssey
programme.desc: Curiosity getting the best of him, Odysseus delves into the depths of the Underworld. He meets the souls of the Greek heroes who fought with him in the city of Troy.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths: The Odyssey
programme.desc: Odysseus' fleet tries to avoid Charybdis, the first sea monster ready to swallow them, but Scylla, a horrible multi-headed creature, destroys three of his ships.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths: The Odyssey
programme.desc: Odysseus has been living out peaceful days with Calypso for 7 years. But waves of nostalgia wash over him, and the memories of his wife, his son and his island never cease to torment him.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths: The Odyssey
programme.desc: The Suitors, informed by Melantho – one of Penelope's servants – learned that the queen had fooled them. They locked her up in the gynaeceum.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths: The Odyssey
programme.desc: Penelope is now forced to choose a husband among the Suitors.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths: The Iliad
programme.desc: A golden apple inscribed 'for the fairest' is sent to a feast at Olympus. Unable to decide between the goddesses Aphrodite, Hera and Athena, Zeus decides to let a mortal choose.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths: The Iliad
programme.desc: All of the Greek kings and their armies have responded to Agamemnon's call... All except two, that is: Odysseus, and Achilles.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths: The Iliad
programme.desc: Ten years have passed since the Greek forces arrived in Troy, but King Priam's city has still not fallen. The king's eldest son, Hector, reproaches his brother Paris for causing this war with no end.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths: The Iliad
programme.desc: Agamemnon has seen it in a dream: Troy will be taken today. Helen's husband Menelaus recognizes Paris, the man who took his wife. The two men decide to face each other in a duel.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths: The Iliad
programme.desc: The chaos that reigns between Greeks and Trojans has now spread to Mount Olympus. Back on the battlefield, the Trojans have driven back the Greeks, and decide to build a long wall.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths: The Iliad
programme.desc: Odysseus and Ajax try to convince Achilles to return to combat, but the Greek warrior rejects their appeals. On the battlefield, Agamemnon, Diomedes and even Odysseus are injured one after the other.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths: The Iliad
programme.desc: Saved by Apollo, Hector goes back on the attack and leads the Trojans as far as the Greeks' ships. Patroclus, a childhood friend of Achilles, rushes to him and implores him to re-join the battle.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths: The Iliad
programme.desc: Thetis asks Hephaestus, the god of blacksmiths to forge new armour and weapons for her son Achilles. At dawn, she hands them to him, knowing that they will lead to his death.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths: The Iliad
programme.desc: The River Scamander and its banks are set alight by fireballs sent by the god Hephaestus. The river god spares Achilles, who immediately goes back on the rampage. The gods are shocked by his rage.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths: The Iliad
programme.desc: The Trojans are surprised to discover that the Greeks have suddenly left the shores of Troy, leaving only a wooden horse. Inside the horse, Greek warriors remain silent and still.

programme.title: Ark of The Covenant

programme.title: Nazi Quest for the Holy Grail

programme.title: Ancient Egypt Top 7 Pyramids

programme.title: The Khufu Pyramid Revealed
programme.desc: The Great Pyramids are the only wonders of the ancient world that still stand today, the greatest of which is the pyramid of Khufu. Many theories have been offered to explain its construction, but none as convincing or unique as this one.

programme.title: Mummies: Secrets of the Pharaohs
programme.desc: Journey to the royal tombs of Egypt and explore the history of ancient Egyptian society as told through the mummies of the past. The film follows explorers and scientists as they piece together the archeological and genetic clues of Egyptian mummies.

programme.title: Ancient Gods of Egypt

programme.desc: Based on Kim Jee-Woon's 2003 Korean horror film. Two sisters return home to their father from a mental institution, whose recovery is hindered by their cruel stepmother.

programme.title: I Shouldn't Be Alive
programme.desc: In August 2002, a young man and woman, once dating, headed for the Amazon rain forest but got lost in the jungle. They have to survive the dangers of the jungle and hold on to their sanity as they find their way home.

programme.title: I Shouldn't Be Alive
programme.desc: In April 2004, Arthur Taylor, Alistair Gellatly, Arthur's wife Fay and parents Clive and Brenda become stranded in the hippo and crocodile-infested Zambezi River when their watercraft is rammed by a mad hippo and sinks.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Dr. Bikini
programme.desc: A resort doctor must treat a man critically injured by a boat propeller; a discharged patient sets off a deadly chain of events by getting a ride from his designated driver; the ER comes to a standstill when the computers and the head nurse are down.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Don't Push It
programme.desc: Three emergency deliveries in the ER cause a turf war with the labor and delivery department; two gunshot victims have a surprising connection; an unidentified jogger goes into a coma and the ER staff becomes detectives trying to find the woman's family.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Twist & Shout
programme.desc: A newlywed's hand gets stuck in a kitchen appliance and a college student is tormented by an injury down under; a heavy drinker is now sober and experiencing life-threatening complications; a woman appears to only have blood flow to half of her brain.

programme.desc: A man flees to Mexico after gunning down his girlfriend in broad daylight.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It

programme.title: Alive
programme.desc: A rocket fuel crew works to repair a fuel tank puncture on a nuclear warhead that’s 600 times more powerful than the Hiroshima bomb.

programme.title: Intervention
programme.desc: Living in a small Hawaiian village, Penny-Lee has an infectious laugh and loves to have fun. But despite having a good family life and four children to be proud of, she's an out-of-control alcoholic who spends most of her time alone.

programme.title: Intervention
programme.desc: Luke, 23, dreams of a career in photojournalism, but his daily cocktail of drugs has derailed his college plans.

programme.title: Intervention

programme.title: Intervention
programme.desc: Brittney saw her food addiction transformed into a raging alcohol addiction after gastric bypass surgery.

programme.title: Intervention
programme.desc: Michelle, 30, looks like an aging mother of two who takes a daily concoction of methadone, Xanax, and blood pressure pills.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner

programme.title: World of WarShips Clash of Titans

programme.desc: Allied convoys resupplying the Soviet Union had to navigate the Arctic, infested with U-boats and enemy aircraft.

programme.title: World of WarShips Clash of Titans

programme.title: World of WarShips Clash of Titans

programme.title: World of WarShips Clash of Titans

programme.title: World War II: Total War

programme.title: World War II: Total War

programme.title: World War II: Total War

programme.title: World War II: Total War
